meta.title: Milky Way Browse Explorer
meta.description: Interactive semantic zoom and navigable galaxy abstraction.

stages.label: Immersive Sky
stages.copy: Mostly lived-in sky. The Milky Way reads as atmosphere before structure.

stages.label: Local Spur
stages.copy: The Orion Spur and Sun marker now explain where the experience sits.

stages.label: Galaxy Map
stages.copy: The galaxy becomes a designed map. Readability wins over literalism.

landmarks.name: Orion Spur
landmarks.copy: The bridge between local sky and global map.
